# StagentHand (shand)
CLI-first AI short drama generation pipeline (Go).
Phase 1: CLI + Store + Server ✅
Phase 2/3: LLM Pipeline + Image Provider (Merged) 🚧

## Tech Stack
- Language: Go (1.21+)
- CLI: Cobra
- Config: Viper
- DB: SQLite (GORM)
- Server: Gin (:28080)
- Testing: testify

## Directory Structure
- /cmd: CLI commands
- /internal/domain: Data structures (Job, Panel, etc.)
- /internal/store: Persistence (GORM)
- /internal/server: HTTP API for HITL
- /internal/llm: LLM Pipeline and Providers
- /internal/image: Image Generation Providers
- /config: Configuration management
